title: RBI Penalty Order - GIC Housing Finance KYC Non-Compliance
description: <cite index="31-4">A penalty of Rs 3.1 lakh was imposed on GIC Housing Finance Ltd for non-compliance with certain provisions of the KYC guidelines.</cite> <cite index="31-7">The company failed to put in place a system of periodic review of risk categorisation of accounts, with such periodicity being at least once in six months.</cite>
